title: ExpOre
description: This is a mod that adds Exp Ores in the game, that drop some amount of experience
body:
This mod add new exp ore, which gives some amount of experience when breaking. They are generated in every dimension.
-  Stone Exp Ores generate between Y=0 and Y=55. 
-  Deepslate Exp Ores generate between Y=-64 and Y=-1.
-  Nether Exp Ores generate between Y=10 and Y=256.
- End Exp Ores generate between Y=0 and Y=64.
